action.reasoning: Observation: The previous run failed with a segfault (exit code 139) very quickly (9.3s). Analysis: Segfaults in PyTorch Geometric are commonly caused by either out-of-bounds embedding indices (if the dataset contains feature values larger than the embedding dictionary size) or multiprocessing issues in the DataLoader (num_workers > 0). Decision: I will increase all embedding dictionary sizes to 256 to safely cover any categorical feature values, and set num_workers=0 in all DataLoaders to prevent multiprocessing-related segfaults. I will also add a safety check for empty batches in the loss calculation. I will run for 2 epochs to establish a baseline and measure iteration time.
